sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 5:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 5:1
items.html: A phase that does not operate in the vessel, whether to bestow or to receive, is called posterior, or posteriors. (Item 15, and Inner Light there)
